primary_diagnosis:
Acute myeloid leukemia with myelodysplasia-related changes (MRC), ID 03.2023
Peripheral blood: anemia, thrombocytopenia, Leukocytes 11200 /µl, approx. 78 % blasts
BMA: AML (M2 after FAB)
Cytogenetics: Complex karyotype: 45, XY, del(5)(q13q33), -7, add(12)(p13),
der(17)t(5;17)(q13;p13) [8]/46, XY [2]
Molecular genetics: FLT3-ITD neg., FLT3-TKD neg., NPM1 WT, IDH1 WT, IDH2 WT, CEBPA WT,
TP53 mutated (VAF 45%), RUNX1 mutated, ASXL1 mutated
ELN classification: adverse risk profile
question: Relapse therapy?
tumor_board_decision:
Salvage therapy with FLAG-IDA VEN (as per cardiology consult if applicable, VEN+HAM)
and upon achieving a new remission 2. allogeneic stem cell transplantation.
raw_vignette:
Age: 70
ECOG: 2
Primary diagnosis:
Acute myeloid leukemia with myelodysplasia-related changes (MRC), ID 03.2023
Peripheral blood: anemia, thrombocytopenia, Leukocytes 11200 /µl, approx. 78 % blasts
BMA: AML (M2 after FAB)
Cytogenetics: Complex karyotype: 45, XY, del(5)(q13q33), -7, add(12)(p13),
der(17)t(5;17)(q13;p13) [8]/46, XY [2]
Molecular genetics: FLT3-ITD neg., FLT3-TKD neg., NPM1 WT, IDH1 WT, IDH2 WT, CEBPA WT,
TP53 mutated (VAF 45%), RUNX1 mutated, ASXL1 mutated
ELN classification: adverse risk profile
Secondary diagnoses:
NYHA II°
History of PTCA with coronary artery disease
Treatment and course:
Question for the tumor board:
Relapse therapy?
Tumor board decision:
Salvage therapy with FLAG-IDA VEN (as per cardiology consult if applicable, VEN+HAM)
and upon achieving a new remission 2. allogeneic stem cell transplantation.
================================================================================
TREATMENT TIMELINE
================================================================================
17.10.2021 Induction I: Cytarabin + Daunorubicin (7+3)
14.11.2021 BKP: refractory, complete BM-infiltration
19.11.2021 Salvage: Vidaza + Venetoclax (Cycle 1)
03.12.2021 BMA: ~10% blasts (cytol.; early assessment)
14.12.2021 BMA: ~10% blasts (cytol.), FACS 6%
22.12.2021 Vidaza + Venetoclax (Cycle 2)
07.01.2022 BMA: CR (cytol.), FISH negative, MRD positive (0,5%)
19.01.2022 Vidaza + Venetoclax (Cycle 3; Venetoclax Day 1-21)
05.03.2022 Allogeneic PBSCT (TBI 8 Gy/Flu/ATG)
27.03.2022 Day+21: skin-aGvHD Grade I, resolving with local therapy
03.04.2022 Day+28 BMA: CR; FISH/MRD negative; Chim BM: 2% recipient
09.04.2022 Maintenance: Vidaza + Venetoclax (Cycle 1)
09.05.2022 Maintenance: Vidaza + Venetoclax (Cycle 2); GI symptoms: GvHD excluded; H.
pylori + Candida
11.06.2022 Maintenance: Vidaza + Venetoclax (Cycle 3)
14.06.2022 Day+100 BMA: 3% blasts; FISH/MRD negative; Chim BM/PB 100% donor; Start
immunosuppression tapering
08.07.2022 Maintenance: Vidaza + Venetoclax (Cycle 4; Venetoclax 200 mg/Day)
22.07.2022 Immunosuppression completed
24.07.2022 Maintenance: Vidaza + Venetoclax (Cycle 5; Venetoclax 200 mg/Day)
14.08.2022 cGvHD joints mild-to-moderate; Hydrocortison; oral candidiasis
27.08.2022 Maintenance: Vidaza Day 1-5 + Venetoclax 100 mg/Day (Cycle 6)
31.08.2022 Day+180 BMA: 3% blasts; MRD negative
07.03.2023 (+12 M) BMA: 3% blasts; MRD/FISH negative; Chim 100% donor; CD4 115/µl;
mild cGvHD (joints/eyes)
04.09.2023 (+18 M) BMA: 3% blasts; MRD/FISH negative; Chim 100% donor;
mild-to-moderate cGvHD (joints/eyes/oral)
17.12.2023 Chimerism PB: 100% donor; continued mild cGvHD
05.03.2024 (+24 M) BMA: CR; MRD/FISH negative; Chim 100% donor; mild cGvHD;
Maintenance (Venetoclax) completed

09.07.2024 Relapse: BMA ~75% blasts; Chim BM 15-25% recipient, PB 5-15%; FISH:
del(5q), Aberr. chr7/17p, +11q; Molek./NGS pending
================================================================================
